{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlady
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Underlady Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An Underlady is a female practitioner who has reached the rank of [[Underlord]], a stage of power below that of an [[Archlady]]. Individuals at this level possess significant spiritual strength and are capable of assuming humanoid forms, though their appearance may vary based on their specific [[Path]] or nature. Some Underladies are [[dragons]] or Truegolds, appearing as scaled, reptilian humanoids who can stand upright and wear clothing. They are capable of utilizing powerful [[Striker techniques]], manifesting energy constructs like sapphire flowers or lightning, and wielding specialized weaponry. While they possess formidable abilities, such as the capacity to endure certain physical burns or manipulate elements like liquid [[dragon]]-fire, they remain distinct from higher ranks like Archlords. The role of an Underlady can involve various responsibilities, ranging from administrative duties in imperial palaces and leading servants to participating in high-level combat or representing major clans and families.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The Underlady is distinguished by her golden, vertically slitted eyes, patches of gold scales on her cheeks, and a thin tail covered in similar scales. She dresses in a sparkling sacred artist's robe composed of red, gold, and purple hues. During combat, she wields a [[sword]] that crackles with orange lightning and launches a rush of liquid flame at [[Yerin]]. Following this attack, she is tackled by her own retainers and can be heard shouting at the [[Skysworn]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Underlady]] wears a sparkling sacred artist's robe of red, gold, and purple.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Underlady]] has golden eyes that are vertically slitted and patches of gold scales on her cheeks.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Underlady]] has a thin, gold-scaled tail.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Underlady]] carries a [[sword]] that crackles with orange lightning.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Underlady]] attacks [[Yerin]] with a rush of liquid flame.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Underlady]] is tackled by her retainers.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Underlady]] shouts at the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|An Underlady represents a specific stage of advancement that requires an individual to face their own truth. One such being appeared as a woman with long, burning hair who cleared a path through the forest by fire. Another Underlady was observed with gray skin and silver hair held by a purple ribbon. During the events at [[Lindon]]'s feet, an Underlady was seen undergoing a process of regeneration.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The woman who appeared was an [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Underlady]] is a woman with long, burning hair who burns her way through the forest.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The process of becoming an [[Underlady]] involves facing the truth of oneself.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Underlady]] is a stage of advancement.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|There is an [[Underlady]] with gray skin and long, flowing silver hair gathered in a purple ribbon.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Underlady]] was regenerating at [[Lindon]]'s feet.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Underlady]] used [[soulfire]] in her technique.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Sophara's family pushed her beyond the maximum capacity of an [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Underlady]] used the echo Forger technique while struggling to maintain an [[Overlord]]’s [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|As an [[Underlady]], [[Yerin]] can go without sleep longer than before.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|An [[Underlady]] in [[Akura]] colors healed [[Daji]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An [[Underlady]] is part of the enemy ranks.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
